title: Referenced Switching canonical identity anchor is missing
description: docs/project_control_board.md and the Switching workstream row both name tables/switching_canonical_identity.csv as an authoritative or canonical anchor, but that file is absent in the repository. analysis/knowledge/run_registry.csv still marks run_2026_04_03_000147_switching_canonical as canonical_identity_anchor, so identity exists only indirectly and the documented anchor path is broken.

title: Query entrypoint can override repo context with external bundle
description: analysis/query/query_system.m prefers C:\\Dev\\matlab-functions_context\\context_bundle.json over docs/context_bundle.json and seeds Switching queries from X-related claims. The control board says query_system is not yet canonical-aware, and the Switching workstream still reports claims_alignment=LEGACY_WEIGHTED, snapshot_alignment=PARTIAL, and query_alignment=NO, so stale or out-of-repo context can be surfaced as if it were current canonical evidence.

title: Width-based X claim still presented as canonical current Switching context
description: claims/X_canonical_coordinate.json, docs/context_bundle.json, docs/repo_state.json, and snapshot indexes still present X = I_peak / (w * S_peak) as a canonical coordinate and seed related evidence from March cross-experiment runs. The current canonical collapse hierarchy explicitly reports used_width_scaling=NO, and the Switching workstream says claims or query propagation for the new canonical collapse metrics is still pending, so the knowledge layer still exposes a deprecated width-linked Switching assumption as canonical-current.
